allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; Get-Command npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source")

Bash(node -e "const { DeepgramClient } = require\(''./node_modules/@deepgram/sdk/dist/cjs/index.js''\); const c = new DeepgramClient\({ apiKey: ''test'' }\); console.log\(''DeepgramClient OK, listen:'', typeof c.listen\); const s = c.listen.v1; console.log\(''listen.v1:'', typeof s\); console.log\(''connect:'', typeof s.connect\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module --eval "import { DeepgramClient } from ''@deepgram/sdk''; const c = new DeepgramClient\({ apiKey: ''test'' }\); console.log\(''OK listen type:'', typeof c.listen\); const s = c.listen.v\(''1''\); console.log\(''v1 type:'', typeof s, typeof s.connect\);")
